generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmission
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing depth and RGB data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelRealSenseDepthDataTransmission
]

instance VehicleOnboardSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle-onboard speed sensor providing ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmission
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering-angle sensor providing steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmission
]

instance HokuyoLiDARDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]

instance IntelRealSenseDepthDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleOnboardSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance IntelRealSenseDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB data from Intel RealSense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelRealSenseDepthDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data from onboard sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series CSV reports generated from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance AccControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model implementing ISO 15622 performance-class I logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlEnabler
]

instance DbscanClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point-cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Object tracking using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance Ros2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance JetPack50Sdk : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance MatlabSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for clustering and tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WifiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication for wireless data transfer"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataTranslationFe : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance OpCuA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA implementation for data translation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance AccControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model implementation using ISO 15622 logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Clustering and tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Report generation for time-series CSV data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI displaying speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, ObjectTracksDisplay
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm executed in the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableAccAction, DisableAccAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generate time-series CSV reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReport
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected path"
]

instance ObjectTracksDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of object tracks from point cloud data"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle environment and object tracks"
]

instance TimeSeriesReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series CSV reports for analysis and reporting"
]

instance EnableAccAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableAccAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AccControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic ACC control based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder electronic speed controller for motor and steering actuation"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on on-board Jetson hardware"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleOnboardSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on external compute hardware"
    base:contains AccControlModel, DbscanClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ObjectTracksDatabase, TimeSeriesReportData, Ros2Middleware, JetPack50Sdk, Python38, CppCompiler, MatlabSimulink, WifiCommunication, DataTranslationFe, OpCuA, AccControlEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on UI host"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity providing data-translation across entities"
    base:contains DataTranslationFe, OpCuA
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT sends ACC‑computed desired speed, enable/disable ACC commands, and emergency‑brake signals back to the PT over Wi‑Fi; Data Translation FE serializes and unit‑converts these commands, which are applied by the Actuation FE to the motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end network latency limited to ≤100 ms (R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (R8)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247‑based architecture mapping Physical Twin Entity (OME analogue), Digital Twin Entity (data collection, reporting, ACC control), User Entity (UI FE), and Cross‑System Entity (data translation), realized as ROS 2 packages across vehicle and external host."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 ACC specification; real sensor data used for object tracking; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms to maintain temporal fidelity; data stored in SQL database for validation; reporting FE generates human‑readable logs."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional Wi‑Fi link between PT and DT; ROS 2 topics for intra‑entity communication; Data Translation FE performs serialization, message‑type alignment, and unit conversion across the network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity run on external compute (e.g., cloud or workstation) connected via Wi‑Fi; each functional entity is packaged as an independent ROS 2 node."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Designed according to ISO 23247 reference architecture; ACC functionality follows ISO 15622; concepts from ISO/IEC 30173:2023 and optional OPC UA (IEC 62541) mentioned for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "System is designed for safety‑critical operation with latency ≤100 ms and synchronized clocks; remote management commands are acknowledged but specific security mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]
